dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires context-dependent direction. Mapped to LONG/SHORT entries separately using pivot points (s1/r1) as reaction levels. Used rsi_7 as closest available short-period RSI to the requested 5-period momentum threshold of 60. Rate-of-change pattern approximated via RSI comparison to previous close for momentum persistence. Stop loss set to 1.5x ATR scale (1.5% as decimal proxy). Entry conditions require price + momentum confirmation + persistence check (rsi > prev_close). Exit triggers on momentum reversal (RSI crossing 50 threshold).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires context-dependent direction. Mapped to LONG/SHORT entries separately using pivot points (s1/r1) as reaction levels. Used rsi_7 as closest available short-period RSI to the requested 5-period momentum threshold of 60. Rate-of-change pattern approximated via RSI comparison to previous close for momentum persistence. Stop loss set to 1.5x ATR scale (1.5% as decimal proxy). Entry conditions require price + momentum confirmation + persistence check (rsi > prev_close). Exit triggers on momentum reversal (RSI crossing 50 threshold).

source_rule_text: Enter trades at points where momentum confirms direction rather than at extreme price levels, to reduce probable risk by trading with the prevailing short-term momentum.
